title: Covid-19 Narratives Driving the Markets
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Obviously, the markets have been affected by Covid-19. As a trader, it’s difficult to wrap your head around because technical analysis alone cannot accurately predict the market behavior during conditions like we are currently experiencing. You need to rely on fundamental analysis. Watch the news. 

The following narratives are likely to affect the markets: [https://tickeron.com/blogs/covid-19-narratives-driving-the-markets-7200](https://tickeron.com/blogs/covid-19-narratives-driving-the-markets-7200)
